calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Field.
Petitioner: Cynthia Ann Brice, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
Without proper medical declaration by a physician under penalty of perjury, Petitioner's request for Change of Gender is DENIED without prejudice.

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition for Change of Name, are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition for Name Change should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Sam Maxwell.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Reset To Mar-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioner: Cynthia Ann Brice, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony by the Petitioner, matter is continued to Mar. 29, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Medical Declaration.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Off Calendar
